Uses of Package
neqsim.mcp.model

Packages that use neqsim.mcp.model
Package
Description
neqsim.mcp.model
Typed model classes for NeqSim MCP (Model Context Protocol) integration.
neqsim.mcp.runners
 
  • Classes in neqsim.mcp.model used by neqsim.mcp.model
    Class
    Description
    ApiEnvelope
    Standard API envelope for all MCP runner responses.
    DiagnosticIssue
    A diagnostic issue found during validation or simulation.
    FlashRequest
    Typed request model for flash calculations.
    ResultProvenance
    Provenance metadata for every MCP calculation result.
    ValueWithUnit
    A numeric value with its associated unit.
  • Classes in neqsim.mcp.model used by neqsim.mcp.runners
    Class
    Description
    ApiEnvelope
    Standard API envelope for all MCP runner responses.
    FlashRequest
    Typed request model for flash calculations.
    FlashResult
    Typed result model for flash calculations.
    ProcessResult
    Typed result model for process simulations.
    ValueWithUnit
    A numeric value with its associated unit.
